description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold, multi-color palette with blue, mint green, pink, and white panels. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with perforations on the toe box for breathability and a padded collar for ankle support. The side panels display a stylized, metallic gradient graphic element, adding a unique urban flair. The midsole is thick and sculpted, providing cushioning and a modern, chunky silhouette, while the outsole is robust and slightly textured for grip. Pink laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the tongue and heel tab are accented with pink and mint details. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for streetwear or casual urban environments.
description: A vibrant, high-top sneaker with blue, mint green, pink, and white panels, featuring a chunky sole and metallic side graphics. The shoe is designed for comfort and style, ideal for urban streetwear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic gradient graphic, blue and mint green panels, and pink laces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pink laces, perforated blue toe box, and padded tongue with pink accent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking and metallic graphic, emphasizing the sculpted sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, mint green heel, and pink heel tab.
